wos: TS=("artificial intelligence" OR "machine learning" OR "deep learning" OR "neural network*" OR "transformer*" OR "large language model*" OR "foundation model*" OR "generative AI" OR "diffusion model*" OR "vision-language model*" OR "GPT*" OR "BERT" OR "CLIP" OR "contrastive learning" OR "self-supervised learning" OR "transfer learning" OR "attention mechanism*") AND TS=("multimodal" OR "multi-modal" OR "cross-modal" OR "data fusion" OR "feature fusion" OR "information fusion" OR "multi-source" OR "heterogeneous data" OR "image-text" OR "vision-language") AND TS=("diagnosis" OR "diagnostic" OR "detection" OR "classification" OR "segmentation" OR "medical imaging" OR "radiology" OR "pathology" OR "clinical decision" OR "computer-aided diagnosis" OR "CAD" OR "screening") AND PY=(2020-2025) AND LA=(English) AND DT=(Article OR Review OR Proceedings Paper)
scopus: TITLE-ABS-KEY("artificial intelligence" OR "machine learning" OR "deep learning" OR "neural network*" OR "transformer*" OR "large language model*" OR "foundation model*" OR "generative AI" OR "diffusion model*" OR "vision-language model*" OR "GPT*" OR "BERT" OR "CLIP" OR "contrastive learning" OR "self-supervised learning" OR "transfer learning" OR "attention mechanism*") AND TITLE-ABS-KEY("multimodal" OR "multi-modal" OR "cross-modal" OR "data fusion" OR "feature fusion" OR "information fusion" OR "multi-source" OR "heterogeneous data" OR "image-text" OR "vision-language") AND TITLE-ABS-KEY("diagnosis" OR "diagnostic" OR "detection" OR "classification" OR "segmentation" OR "medical imaging" OR "radiology" OR "pathology" OR "clinical decision" OR "computer-aided diagnosis" OR "CAD" OR "screening") AND PUBYEAR > 2019 AND PUBYEAR < 2026 AND LANGUAGE("English") AND DOCTYPE("ar" OR "re" OR "cp")
